name: numo-roku-portal-v2
description: Commercial-grade semantic streaming deployment package for Roku devices

scripts.preinstall:
node -e "var m=(process.env.npm_config_user_agent||'').match(/pnpm/(\d+)/);if(m&&+m[1]<9){console.error('
\x1b[31m❌ pnpm '+m[1]+'.x detected — this project requires pnpm >= 9.
   Run: npm install -g pnpm@9\x1b[0m
');process.exit(1)}"

author: Lumen Helix Solutions
